=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (4:30-4:36) TS377014: You are returning an Effect-able type inside a generator function, and will result in nested Effect<Effect<...>>.
Maybe you wanted to return yield* instead?
Nested Effect-able types may be intended if you plan to later manually flatten or unwrap this Effect, if so you can safely disable this diagnostic for this line through quickfixes. effect(returnEffectInGen)
  Fix 0: "Disable returnEffectInGen for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable returnEffectInGen for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Add yield* statement"

[D2] (11:13-11:18) TS377006: It is recommended to use return yield* for Effects that never succeed to signal a definitive exit point for type narrowing and tooling support. effect(missingReturnYieldStar)
  Fix 0: "Disable missingReturnYieldStar for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable missingReturnYieldStar for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Add return statement"

[D3] (18:9-18:14) TS377006: It is recommended to use return yield* for Effects that never succeed to signal a definitive exit point for type narrowing and tooling support. effect(missingReturnYieldStar)
  Fix 0: "Disable missingReturnYieldStar for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable missingReturnYieldStar for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Add return statement"

[D4] (19:9-19:14) TS377006: It is recommended to use return yield* for Effects that never succeed to signal a definitive exit point for type narrowing and tooling support. effect(missingReturnYieldStar)
  Fix 0: "Disable missingReturnYieldStar for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable missingReturnYieldStar for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Add return statement"

[D5] (25:5-25:14) TS7027: Unreachable code detected.
  (no quick fixes)

=== Quick Fix Application Results ===

=== [D1] Fix 0: "Disable returnEffectInGen for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 1: "Disable returnEffectInGen for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 2: "Add yield* statement" ===

--- file:///.src/missingReturnYieldStar.ts ---
import { Effect } from "effect"

export const shouldNotComplain = Effect.gen(function*() {
    if (Math.random() < 0.5) return yield* Effect.succeed(42)
    return yield* Effect.fail("no.")
})

export const shouldComplain = (n: number) =>
    Effect.gen(function*() {
        if (n === 0) {
            yield* Effect.fail("no zero!")
        }
        return n / 1
    })

export const shouldComplainOther = (n: number) =>
    Effect.gen(function*() {
        yield* Effect.interrupt
        yield* Effect.die("lol")
        return n / 1
    })

export const shouldNotComplainThrows = Effect.gen(function*() {
    throw yield* Effect.fail(42)
    return 42
})

export const shouldNotComplainEventually = Effect.eventually(
    Effect.gen(function*() {
        if (Math.random() < 0.5) {
            return yield* Effect.fail("Not ready")
        }
        return 42
    })
)


=== [D2] Fix 0: "Disable missingReturnYieldStar for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 1: "Disable missingReturnYieldStar for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 2: "Add return statement" ===

--- file:///.src/missingReturnYieldStar.ts ---
import { Effect } from "effect"

export const shouldNotComplain = Effect.gen(function*() {
    if (Math.random() < 0.5) return Effect.succeed(42)
    return yield* Effect.fail("no.")
})

export const shouldComplain = (n: number) =>
    Effect.gen(function*() {
        if (n === 0) {
            return yield* Effect.fail("no zero!");
        }
        return n / 1
    })

export const shouldComplainOther = (n: number) =>
    Effect.gen(function*() {
        yield* Effect.interrupt
        yield* Effect.die("lol")
        return n / 1
    })

export const shouldNotComplainThrows = Effect.gen(function*() {
    throw yield* Effect.fail(42)
    return 42
})

export const shouldNotComplainEventually = Effect.eventually(
    Effect.gen(function*() {
        if (Math.random() < 0.5) {
            return yield* Effect.fail("Not ready")
        }
        return 42
    })
)


=== [D3] Fix 0: "Disable missingReturnYieldStar for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D3] Fix 1: "Disable missingReturnYieldStar for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D3] Fix 2: "Add return statement" ===

--- file:///.src/missingReturnYieldStar.ts ---
import { Effect } from "effect"

export const shouldNotComplain = Effect.gen(function*() {
    if (Math.random() < 0.5) return Effect.succeed(42)
    return yield* Effect.fail("no.")
})

export const shouldComplain = (n: number) =>
    Effect.gen(function*() {
        if (n === 0) {
            yield* Effect.fail("no zero!")
        }
        return n / 1
    })

export const shouldComplainOther = (n: number) =>
    Effect.gen(function*() {
        return yield* Effect.interrupt;
        yield* Effect.die("lol")
        return n / 1
    })

export const shouldNotComplainThrows = Effect.gen(function*() {
    throw yield* Effect.fail(42)
    return 42
})

export const shouldNotComplainEventually = Effect.eventually(
    Effect.gen(function*() {
        if (Math.random() < 0.5) {
            return yield* Effect.fail("Not ready")
        }
        return 42
    })
)


=== [D4] Fix 0: "Disable missingReturnYieldStar for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D4] Fix 1: "Disable missingReturnYieldStar for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D4] Fix 2: "Add return statement" ===

--- file:///.src/missingReturnYieldStar.ts ---
import { Effect } from "effect"

export const shouldNotComplain = Effect.gen(function*() {
    if (Math.random() < 0.5) return Effect.succeed(42)
    return yield* Effect.fail("no.")
})

export const shouldComplain = (n: number) =>
    Effect.gen(function*() {
        if (n === 0) {
            yield* Effect.fail("no zero!")
        }
        return n / 1
    })

export const shouldComplainOther = (n: number) =>
    Effect.gen(function*() {
        yield* Effect.interrupt
        return yield* Effect.die("lol");
        return n / 1
    })

export const shouldNotComplainThrows = Effect.gen(function*() {
    throw yield* Effect.fail(42)
    return 42
})

export const shouldNotComplainEventually = Effect.eventually(
    Effect.gen(function*() {
        if (Math.random() < 0.5) {
            return yield* Effect.fail("Not ready")
        }
        return 42
    })
)
